issue_title: Fixed minimal sizing of the 3 lower boxes
issue_body_preview:
Minor fix to allow boxes to have a `-1` offset to fit all three boxes in one row depending on the sizing of the terminal window.

Depending on the size of the window, the three sizes of `34%`, `34%` and `33%` can cause an overflow. Testing different sizing configurations, `34%-1`, `34%-1` and `33%
test_description_zh: 在不同终端窗口尺寸下，观察 webpack-dashboard 底部三个信息框（boxes）的布局排列情况，特别关注较小窗口尺寸时三个框是否能正常排列在同一行内。
expected_result_zh: 底部三个信息框在各种终端窗口尺寸下均能正确排列在同一行中，不会因宽度溢出而导致某个框被挤到下一行或显示异常。
